title: Image Map
content: ### HTML Image Maps An **image map** lets you create clickable areas on an image. --- ### How It Works 1. Use `` with `usemap="#name"` 2. Define the map with `` 3. Add clickable areas with `` --- ### Example ```html ``` --- ### Shape Types | Shape | coords Format | Description | |-------|--------------|-------------| | `rect` | `left,top,right,bottom` | Rectangle | | `circle` | `center_x,center_y,radius` | Circle | | `poly` | `x1,y1,x2,y2,...,xn,yn` | Polygon | | `default` | (none) | Entire image | --- ### Area Attributes | Attribute | Purpose | |-----------|---------| | `shape` | Shape of clickable area | | `coords` | Coordinates of area | | `href` | Link destination | | `alt` | Alternative text | | `target` | Where to open link | --- > **Use Case:** Image maps are useful for interactive diagrams, floor plans, geographical maps, and infographics.
codeExample: Click left or right side of the image.

quiz.question: Which attribute links an image to a map?
